data.title: Spot silver continues its upward trend, breaking through $114 per ounce, up 10.45% on the day.
data.description: Market data shows that spot silver's upward trend continues, breaking through $114 per ounce, a daily increase of 10.45%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin Absorbs Heavy Selling on Binance as Market Structure Holds Firm
data.description:
According to a report shared by CryptoQuant, Bitcoin is currently facing tactical selling pressure on Binance, but without the kind of order-flow imbalance that typically precedes a structural breakdown. Despite elevated sell activity, liquidity conditions suggest the market is absorbing pressure rather than capitulating.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-absorbs-heavy-selling-on-binance-as-market-structure-holds-firm/

data.title: Netherlands’ Bitcoin Taxes Tighten as They Target Unrealized Gains
data.description:
The Netherlands is preparing a significant overhaul of its capital taxation framework. This would introduce taxes on both realized and unrealized gains across cryptocurrencies. A majority of lawmakers are signaling support for the reform, and it’s expected to take effect in 2028
source: https://www.techgaged.com/netherlands-bitcoin-taxes-tighten-as-they-target-unrealized-gains/

data.title: US Bitcoin miners cut output during Winter Storm Fern as network hashrate dips
data.description:
Bitcoin mining output fell across major US firms during Winter Storm Fern as grid pressure prompted power curtailments.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/us-bitcoin-miners-cut-output-during-winter-storm-fern-as-network-hashrate-dips/

data.title: Ethereum founder backtracks on controversial blockchain stance after breakthrough
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, has admitted he was wrong about something he said nearly ten years ago. The blockchain pioneer recently said he’s changed his mind about how users should interact with and check blockchain networks. Buterin caused a stir in 2017 when he referred to the notion of individuals verifying blockchain data on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-founder-backtracks-on-stance/

data.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Corners 3.5% of Ethereum Supply as Treasury Tops With 4.24M ETH Buy
data.description:
BitMine Immersion continues its systematic Ethereum accumulation, adding 40,302 $ETH this week to reach a total of 4,243,338 $ETH (~3. 52% of the circulating supply), with a treasury valued at $12. 3B

data.title: Crypto Funds Shed $1.73B Last Week, Largest Figure Since November
data.description:
Digital asset investment products saw $1. 73 billion in outflows last week as U. S. -led redemptions intensified.
source: https://decrypt.co/355848/crypto-funds-shed-1-73b-last-week-largest-figure-since-november

data.title: Sharps Technology Reports Revenue from Solana Staking
data.description: Sharps Technology, a company listed on Nasdaq, has released its inaugural report on revenue generated from staking its Solana (SOL) holdings. According to NS3.AI, the company has achieved an average annual staking yield of around 7%, excluding fees, through its validator partnerships. With a holding of 2 million SOL tokens, Sharps Technology is valued at approximately $250 million and ranks as the fifth-largest public company with a strategic position in SOL.

data.title: Synopsys CEO projects chip shortage will spill through 2027
data.description:
Memory chips, prices and AI infrastructure are now tightly linked as the global semiconductor market enters what industry leaders, including Synopsys CEO describe as a prolonged supply squeeze. The increase in investment into building AI data centers using high-bandwidth memory (HBM) has created an imbalance of demand compared to supply, which has resulted in the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/synopsys-ceo-projects-chip-shortage-to-2027/

data.title: Spot silver surged $10 intraday, now breaking through $113 per ounce.
data.description: Spot silver surged $10.00 intraday, currently trading at $113.22 per ounce, a gain of 9.69%. (Jinshi)

data.title: A whale deposited 25,000 ETH into Gemini, worth $72.38 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 25,000 ETH into the cryptocurrency exchange Gemini, worth $72.38 million. This whale has now deposited 75,000 ETH into Gemini, worth nearly $215 million.

data.title: Silver Short Positions Increase with Significant Losses
data.description: Silver short positions have seen a notable increase in the past hour. According to Odaily, the entity known as 'Silver Ironhead Bears' has been incrementally adding to its positions. Currently, their 20x leveraged silver short positions have grown to approximately 361,995 units of xyz:SILVER, with unrealized losses exceeding $6.5 million. The liquidation price stands at $125.3542.

data.title: Societe Generale Predicts Gold Prices to Reach $6,000 per Ounce by Year-End
data.description: Societe Generale has announced that its previous forecast of gold prices reaching $5,000 per ounce by the end of the year has been met. According to Odaily, the bank now anticipates that gold prices will rise to $6,000 per ounce by year-end. However, it cautions that this estimate might be conservative, suggesting that prices could potentially exceed this level.

data.title: BNB Chain's Prediction Market Volume Surpasses $20 Billion
data.description: BNB Chain's on-chain prediction market has reached a cumulative trading volume exceeding $20 billion. According to Odaily, this milestone was highlighted in a post on the X platform, citing data from Dune.

data.title: SEC and CFTC Reschedule Joint Event to Discuss Cryptocurrency Coordination
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has officially announced the rescheduling of its joint event with the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). According to Odaily, the event will now take place on January 29, Thursday, from 2 p.m. to 3 p.m. Eastern Time at the CFTC headquarters. The focus of the event will be on the coordination between the two agencies and their efforts to fulfill U.S. President Donald Trump's commitment to establishing the United States as the global hub for cryptocurrency.
